title: Student Retention Analytics
summary: Spot retention risks, intervention windows, and program-level trends across learner cohorts.
knowledge_base: Student Retention Analytics is positioned as a EdTech starter that emphasizes fast iteration, clear documentation, and production-friendly interfaces.
The primary value proposition is: Spot retention risks, intervention windows, and program-level trends across learner cohorts.
Recommended operating model: ship a small API, add observability, validate outputs with stakeholder review, and monitor the top business KPI every week.
Typical stakeholders include analytics, operations, product, and leadership teams working on students, retention, analytics.
